mapper.delete: ALTER TABLE AGG_VSWITCH_PORT_FLOW_30M DELETE WHERE TIME < #{time}
mapper.select:
SELECT MAC as mac,DOMAIN_ID as domainId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
ROUND(sum(RX_FLOW_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 1800, 1800, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) + ROUND(sum(TX_FLOW_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 1800, 1800, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) as allFlow
ROUND(sum(RX_FLOW_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 1800, 1800, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) allFlow
ROUND(sum(TX_FLOW_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 1800, 1800, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) allFlow
FROM (SELECT DOMAIN_ID, TIME, MAC,
avgMerge(RX_FLOW_AVG) AS RX_FLOW_AVG, avgMerge(TX_FLOW_AVG) AS TX_FLOW_AVG
avgMerge(RX_FLOW_AVG) AS RX_FLOW_AVG
avgMerge(TX_FLOW_AVG) AS TX_FLOW_AVG
FROM AGG_VSWITCH_PORT_FLOW_30M WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND DOMAIN_ID = ${domainId}
AND DOMAIN_ID in (${vmIds})
GROUP BY HOST_POOL_ID, CLUSTER_ID, HOST_ID, DOMAIN_ID, MAC, TIME) FLOW GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID, MAC, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT MAC as mac,DOMAIN_ID as domainId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
ROUND(avgMerge(RX_FLOW_AVG),2) as avgRxFlow , maxMerge(RX_FLOW_MAX) as maxRxFlow, minMerge(RX_FLOW_MIN) as minRxFlow
ROUND(avgMerge(TX_FLOW_AVG),2) as avgTxFlow , maxMerge(TX_FLOW_MAX) as maxTxFlow, minMerge(TX_FLOW_MIN) as minTxFlow
FROM AGG_VSWITCH_PORT_FLOW_30M detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND DOMAIN_ID = ${domainId}
AND DOMAIN_ID in (${vmIds})
AND MAC =#{mac}
GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID, MAC, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT any(MAC) as mac,DOMAIN_ID as domainId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
ROUND(avgMerge(RX_FLOW_AVG),2) as avgRxFlow
ROUND(avgMerge(TX_FLOW_AVG),2) as avgTxFlow
FROM AGG_VSWITCH_PORT_FLOW_30M detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND DOMAIN_ID in (${vmIds})
AND MAC =#{mac}
GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT any(MAC) as mac,DOMAIN_ID as domainId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
ROUND(sum(RX_FLOW_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 1800, 1800, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) + ROUND(sum(TX_FLOW_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 1800, 1800, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) as allFlow
ROUND(sum(RX_FLOW_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 1800, 1800, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) allFlow
ROUND(sum(TX_FLOW_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 1800, 1800, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) allFlow
FROM (SELECT DOMAIN_ID, TIME, MAC,
avgMerge(RX_FLOW_AVG) AS RX_FLOW_AVG, avgMerge(TX_FLOW_AVG) AS TX_FLOW_AVG
avgMerge(RX_FLOW_AVG) AS RX_FLOW_AVG
avgMerge(TX_FLOW_AVG) AS TX_FLOW_AVG
FROM AGG_VSWITCH_PORT_FLOW_30M WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND DOMAIN_ID in (${vmIds})
GROUP BY HOST_POOL_ID, CLUSTER_ID, HOST_ID, DOMAIN_ID, MAC, TIME) FLOW GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

select b.uuid as uuid, a.MAC as mac, a.TIME as time, a.RX_FLOW as rxFlow, a.TX_FLOW as txFlow from (select TIME,MAC, round(avgMerge(RX_FLOW_AVG),2) as RX_FLOW, round(avgMerge(TX_FLOW_AVG),2) as TX_FLOW,DOMAIN_ID from AGG_VSWITCH_PORT_FLOW_30M where TIME between ${startTime} and ${endTime} and CLUSTER_ID = ${clusterId} GROUP BY TIME, MAC, DOMAIN_ID) as a join ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_DOMAIN} as b on a.DOMAIN_ID=b.id order by uuid, mac, time
